question: 统计每种订单状态的订单数量
reference_sql: SELECT order_status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY order_status

question: 找出销售额最高的前 3 个商品类别
reference_sql: SELECT p.product_category_name, SUM(i.price) AS total_price FROM order_items AS i JOIN products AS p ON i.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_category_name ORDER BY total_price DESC LIMIT 3

question: 计算每月销售额趋势
reference_sql: SELECT substr(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 1, 7) AS month, SUM(i.price) AS total_price FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS i ON o.order_id = i.order_id GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: 危险 SQL 应被拒绝
WITH 中包含 DELETE 应被拒绝
reference_sql: WITH x AS (SELECT 1) DELETE FROM orders
